_comment: PLACEHOLDER example roster — committed for documentation/tests ONLY. All data is fake (note the obviously-fake student_ids/names/phones). NEVER put real student data in this or any tracked file; the real store is gitignored (students.local.json) or a live SIS. Schema: student-profile.schema.json. Policy: student-data-policy.md.
